# warp(to:duration:)

**Type Method**

Creates an action to distort a node based using an [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometry] object.

## Declaration

```swift
class func warp(to warp: SKWarpGeometry, duration: TimeInterval) -> SKAction?
```

## Parameters

- **warp**: The warp geometry to distort the node to.
- **duration**: The duration of the animation.

## Return Value

A new action object.

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometryGrid/numberOfColumns] and [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometryGrid/numberOfRows] in the node’s current geometry should match those of the specified geometry.

## Animate the Warping of a Node

- **animate(withWarps:times:)**: Creates an action to distort a node through a sequence of [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometry] objects.
- **animate(withWarps:times:restore:)**: Creates an action to distort a node through a sequence of [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKWarpGeometry] objects.
